#import all libraries and initialise Spark Session
from collections.abc import Mapping
import json
import requests
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, IntegerType, StringType, DoubleType
from itertools import chain
from operator import add
#ignore FutureWarning messages 
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message="iteritems is deprecated")
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pprint import pprint as pp
import pyspark.sql.functions as F 
import pandas as pd
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

# Load schema JSON from GitHub or local path
#df = spark.read.load('abfss://odw-config@pinsstodwdevuks9h80mb.dfs.core.windows.net/schema_creation/Sample_Schema.json', format='json',multiLine=True)
#display(df)
schema_json_url = "https://pinsstodwdevuks9h80mb.dfs.core.windows.net/odw-config/schema_creation/Sample_Schema.json"
schema_data = requests.get(schema_json_url).json()

# Function to convert JSON schema to PySpark StructType
def create_spark_schema(fields):
    return StructType([
        StructField(field["name"],
                    IntegerType() if field["type"] == "integer" else
                    StringType() if field["type"] == "string" else
                    DoubleType(),
                    field["nullable"])
        for field in fields

# Loop through tables and create empty DataFrames
tables = schema_data.get("tables", {})
for table_name, table_info in tables.items():
    schema = create_spark_schema(table_info["fields"])
   
    # Create an empty DataFrame with the schema
    df = spark.createDataFrame([], schema)
    df.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(f"odw_standardised_db.{table_name}")

spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("ERROR")
